title: Christian Worship pack
description: A simple recourse pack I made based off of some of my favorite worship songs and recommended songs, too
body:
Hello everyone! I hope you enjoy my pack, and if you don't see any songs you like, then join my discord, I have a chat room made specifically for pack ideas. 

**I wont add anything other than worship music!!!**

My discord:
https://discord.gg/Zupxdwz2gR

I also can't add any song longer than 5:45, because I don't know how to change the duration of the original music discs, which is how this pack works.

This is a recourse pack. To add it into your game, you need to download the version you want, launch minecraft, and open the recourse packs tab. Open your files, and drag and drop the pack into your recourse packs. I hope this helps.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/zPotlr04I3U" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
